step_rationale: Marker of oxidative modification driving atherosclerotic lipid oxidation.
mechanism: Oxidative stress marker reflecting protein oxidation in atherosclerotic plaque and lipid peroxidation.

references.title: Elevated lipopolysaccharide level is largely driven by time since symptom onset in acute ischemic stroke: the impact on clinical outcomes.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
